title: Add detailed TX/RX logging in simulator, Renode peripherals, native
description: Add comprehensive structured logging for all TX and RX paths across: Python simulator (enhance existing _debug_log calls), Renode C# peripherals (LichenSubGHz.cs, SX1262.cs), native Zephyr drivers (lora_sim.c, lora_renode.c), and renode_server.py. Include node_id, state, timings, queue lengths, RSSI/SNR where applicable. Integrate and expand test_simulation_logging.py and Renode integration tests to verify the new logs. Ensure logs use consistent structured format (structlog in Python, LOG_DBG in C). Close when verified with pytest and Renode tests.
